how: Moved account settings into the AppChrome/AppSettingsDrawer composition, removed My Page account edit sections, fixed drawer shell coordinates, added unit, regression, and E2E guards for settings, notifications, and account ownership, then removed the fixed feedback footer so account content and feedback share the scrollable settings drawer body.
problem: The settings drawer escaped layout bounds and My Page still owned account editing controls; later, the settings drawer fixed feedback footer blocked access to longer account management content.
remainingGap: None for the TSK-021-09 corrective scope.
why: Keep the gear as the owner of app settings and account settings, while My Page remains an activity dashboard and settings drawer content remains scroll-accessible.
